Daily: 60 gems/day and 1 standard pull/day
Dispatch: 20 gems/day
Dive weekly: 350 gems/week and 10 standard pulls/week
D-tide bi-weekly: 1150 gems/bi-weekly (if you clear all 2nd diffculty)
Awaker’s Birthday: 50 gems
Maintenance every 2 weeks: 200 gems and 5 standard pulls
every four weeks there is daily login for 10 limited rolls
